title: Trigger automation when Zapier creates a new item

posts.author: fabiany (Fabian Yanofsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there.

I have integrated WPforms and monday.com and it works realy nicely.
I want to add an automation that will distribute the coming rows per selected value in status field “City” so when a City is X send item to X board.

The thing is that all the automation relay on status change which does not happen here…

Do you have an advise on how to do this ?

Regards,

Fabian

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @fabiany,

This is a bit of a tricky one…it is a bit of a limitation at the moment. Is it possible to set a custom status when you create the item through the automation? I’m wondering if maybe we can make use of this:

So for example, create the item with a status of “Miami” and it will move the item to the “Florida” group.
-Danny
